scene: A bright single star and a tiny cartoon Earth with a measuring line between them, big black caps 4 LIGHT-YEARS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
The big number 4 with a tiny walking stick figure, big black caps SOUNDS CLOSE? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A doodle rocket aimed along a dotted line at the far star, big black caps OUR FASTEST. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A towering mountain of stacked calendar pages beside the tiny rocket, big black caps 77,000 YEARS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A big glowing red question mark over the starfield, big black caps THE FIRST PROBLEM. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
